new_jobs.title: Electrical / ICT Engineer
new_jobs.description:
About Hewad Behram Logistics & Construction Company
Hewad Bahram Group (HBG) is a dynamic conglomerate comprising Hewad Bahram Logistics & Construction Company (HBLCC) and Hewad Bahram Research & Consulting Services (HBRC). Established in 2010, HBG is a leading provider of innovative logistics, construction, research, and consulting solutions in Afghanistan. Headquartered in Kabul, with a nationwide presence, HBLCC specializes in cost-effective construction services and logistics, while HBRC offers tailored research and consultancy expertise. Our commitment to client satisfaction and excellence drives us to deliver quality services tailored to meet your specific needs.
At Hewad Bahram Group, our dedication to excellence and client satisfaction remains unwavering. Whether you require support in construction, logistics, procurement, or strategic consultancy, HBG is poised to be your trusted partner in achieving your objectives.

Job Description
Hewad Bahram Logistics and Construction Company (HBLCC) is seeking to hire a qualified and experienced Electrical Engineer to support the planning, design, supervision, and implementation of electrical engineering works related to building construction projects, including Information and Communication Technology (ICT) systems integration. The selected candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all electrical and ICT systems are designed and executed in compliance with technical standards, project specifications, and safety regulations.
The Electrical Engineer will play a key role in the successful delivery of projects by providing technical expertise in electrical installations, ICT infrastructure, quality assurance, and coordination with project teams and stakeholders.

Job Requirements
1. Area of Experience Required
Electrical Engineering with proven experience in ICT systems related to building infrastructure.
2. Key Responsibilities
The Electrical Engineer shall be responsible for, but not limited to, the following:
Design, review, and supervise electrical systems for building construction projects including power distribution, lighting, grounding, fire alarm, and low-current systems.
Design, review, and supervise ICT systems including structured cabling, data networks, CCTV, access control, public address systems, intercom systems, and related communication infrastructure.
Prepare technical drawings, BOQs, specifications, and cost estimates for electrical and ICT works.
Ensure compliance with national and international electrical and ICT codes, standards, and project requirements.

Submission Guideline
Applications should be submitted via email to: hr.hblcc2015@gmail.com
Please mention the Vacancy Number and your Full Name in the subject line of the email.
Submission of educational documents is mandatory. Incomplete applications without academic certificates will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Submission Email
hr.hblcc2015@gmail.com

details.Experience: Minimum 5 years of position-specific experience in Electrical Engineering, particularly in building-related electrical systems, ICT infrastructure, and construction projects.
details.Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognized university.
details.Years of Experience: Minimum 5 years of position-specific experience in Electrical Engineering, particularly in building-related electrical systems, ICT infrastructure, and construction projects.

new_jobs.title: Market Data Analyst
new_jobs.category: Business Administration, Sales/Marketing, Statistics, Data Science, Economist
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
To collect, analyze, and interpret market data to support strategic decision‑making and business growth. The role provides insights on customer behavior, market trends, competitor activities, and sales performance, enabling data‑driven marketing and operational planning.

Duties and Responsibilities
Collect and analyze market data from internal and external sources.
Monitor market trends, customer preferences, and competitor activities.
Prepare reports on sales performance, customer behavior, and market opportunities.
Support marketing and sales teams with data‑driven insights.
Conduct market research and customer surveys.
Identify business growth opportunities through data analysis.
Track campaign performance and customer response rates.
Maintain accurate databases and dashboards for reporting.
Present findings and recommendations to management.
Assist in forecasting sales and market demand.
Ensure data accuracy and confidentiality.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Statistics, Economics, Business Administration, Data Science, or
related field
1–5 years of experience in market analysis, business intelligence, or data reporting
Experience with SQL, Power BI, Tableau, or advanced Excel is an added advantage
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent attention to detail
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Power BI, or data analysis tools
Knowledge of CRM systems and reporting software
Good communication and presentation skills
Ability to interpret complex data into simple business insights
Time management and organizational skills
Basic understanding of marketing and business strategy

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should click the link below and complete the application form.
https://forms.gle/kguZeeNzh9oWGRPZA

details.Functional Area: Business Administration, Sales/Marketing, Statistics, Data Science, Economist

expiring_today.title: Digital Marketing Manager
expiring_today.description:
About ZOODPAY
ZoodPay is a telecom services company that began its operations in 2023, founded by a dedicated and creative Afghan investor. The company aims to serve various business models, including B2B, B2C, and C2C, by providing a comprehensive prepaid electronic mobile top-up distribution service across the country.
The Zoodpay platform is developed and managed by a team of experienced professionals with expertise in telecom products, services distribution, and the fintech industry. Its advanced features are thoughtfully designed to meet the needs of merchants, offering a flexible and trustworthy platform that strategically secures their investments and ensures a healthy return on investment over time.
VISION:
Zoodpay is committed to innovation, creativity, and security. The platform offers multiple access channels, delivering the most secure and instantaneous prepaid mobile recharge sales and bundle activation services for mobile network operators (MNOs) customers, both within the country and abroad.
MISSION STATEMENT:
Zoodpay aims to become the leading on-demand electronic mobile top-up distribution platform for merchants and customers globally. Our platform is developed based on the feedback from merchants and customers, enabling all target users to benefit from a comprehensive mobile top-up distribution system that emphasizes ongoing development and collaboration.

Job Description
The Digital Marketing Officer will oversee a wide range of content creation and strategic communication tasks. This role involves developing and managing a content calendar that aligns with Zoodpay's program priorities, including creating engaging social media posts, videos, and graphics.
The officer will lead the production of digital campaigns for key events and manage the internal newsletter. Additionally, they will implement social media strategies to increase engagement and followers, analyze digital trends, and refine strategies based on data insights.
The incumbent will also spearhead digital marketing campaigns, collaborate with influencers, and ensure that all digital content adheres to Zoodpay's branding guidelines and strategic goals while maintaining brand consistency across all digital platforms.
Duties and responsibilities
Website Management: Oversee our Content Management System (CMS) by optimizing Search Engine Optimization (SEO). Ensure that all content is current, maintains a consistent tone of voice, provides a clear user journey, and measures performance against specific KPIs .
Content Creation: Write engaging content tailored for various audiences that aligns with brand guidelines. Stay informed about all aspects of Trees for Life’s work to ensure relevance and accuracy.
Social Media: Plan and coordinate a schedule of activities across platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube to expand our social media audience .
Advertising: Manage Pay-Per-Click (PPC) advertising and online ad campaigns, regularly reviewing and adjusting keywords and ad groups to optimize performance. Additionally, maintain our presence on third-party sites, ensuring all messaging is current .
Email Marketing: Plan and execute a regular schedule of email marketing activities aimed at growing our subscriber base. Create engaging and relevant content, including testing strategies to optimize results.
Print Production: Coordinate the printing and production of our magazine, leaflets, banners, and other materials, including writing, editing, and proofing. Organize occasional print advertisements.
Brand Compliance: Implement brand guidelines and ensure adherence across all areas of work.
Reporting and Analysis: Monitor, report, and analyze results to enhance performance using tools like Google Analytics. Make necessary amendments and improvements based on findings.
Continuous Improvement: Stay updated on the latest trends and best practices in online marketing and measurement. Carry out additional duties as required, in line with the responsibilities of this position.
Motion Graphics Design : create visually engaging animations and videos that combine graphic design with animation to effectively communicate ideas through dynamic visuals. Will work on various projects, including social media content, website animations, and video marketing materials.
Graphic Design : create visual concepts to effectively communicate ideas and messages to consumers. They are responsible for the overall layout and production design of various applications, such as websites, advertisements, brochures, and magazines. Key responsibilities include meeting with Zoodpay Sr. Management to discuss project requirements, developing design concepts, selecting appropriate media and design elements, preparing drafts, and ensuring that the final product meets Zoodpay's needs and quality standards

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, or a related field.
Proven 5+ years of working experience in digital marketing or a related role
Certification in Graphic Design and Digital Marketing is preferred.
Strong professional skills in graphic design, including image and video creation, with a high priority placed on motion graphics expertise.
Strong understanding of current online marketing concepts, strategies, and best practices.
Experience with SEO, PPC, Google Analytics, and various social media platforms.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Ability to analyze data and provide evidence-based recommendations.
Creative thinking and problem-solving abilities.
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
Familiarity with content management systems (CMS).
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are encouraged to submit their CVs along with a cover letter to hr@zood-pay.com by April 30, 2026. Please include the vacancy number, position title (VA-ZP-26-03 Digital Marketing Manager) in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application will not be considered.

details.Experience: Proven 5+ years of working experience in digital marketing or a related role
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, or a related field

expiring_today.title: Full-Stack Developer / DevOps Engineer
expiring_today.description:
About ZOODPAY
ZoodPay is a telecom services company that began its operations in 2023, founded by a dedicated and creative Afghan investor. The company aims to serve various business models, including B2B, B2C, and C2C, by providing a comprehensive prepaid electronic mobile top-up distribution service across the country.
The Zoodpay platform is developed and managed by a team of experienced professionals with expertise in telecom products, services distribution, and the fintech industry. Its advanced features are thoughtfully designed to meet the needs of merchants, offering a flexible and trustworthy platform that strategically secures their investments and ensures a healthy return on investment over time.
VISION:
Zoodpay is committed to innovation, creativity, and security. The platform offers multiple access channels, delivering the most secure and instantaneous prepaid mobile recharge sales and bundle activation services for mobile network operators (MNOs) customers, both within the country and abroad.
MISSION STATEMENT:
Zoodpay aims to become the leading on-demand electronic mobile top-up distribution platform for merchants and customers globally. Our platform is developed based on the feedback from merchants and customers, enabling all target users to benefit from a comprehensive mobile top-up distribution system that emphasizes ongoing development and collaboration.

Job Description
We are seeking a skilled Full-Stack Developer with DevOps experience to join our technology unit and take ownership of our unified mobile top-up platform once delivered by the contractor. This individual will be responsible for ongoing development, system maintenance, deployment automation, and continuous improvements. The role requires a hands-on developer who can ensure the reliability, scalability, and security of our platform while working closely with business and network teams.
Key Responsibilities:
Post-handover ownership of the mobile top-up system.
Develop, test, and deploy new features and small enhancements.
Manage DevOps pipelines: CI/CD, containerization, version control, and monitoring.
Oversee server/cloud infrastructure in collaboration with the network specialist.
Perform troubleshooting, debugging, and optimization of system performance.
Maintain code repositories, documentation, and release processes.
Implement security and compliance best practices.
Coordinate with the business lead for roadmap and technical priorities.
Mentor junior developers/support staff in the future as the team grows.
Technical Skills:
Strong knowledge of front-end frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue).
Back-end expertise in Node.js, Java, or .NET (depending on your contractor’s stack).
Experience with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
DevOps skills: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitLab CI/Jenkins/GitHub Actions).
Cloud hosting (AWS, Azure, or on-prem servers).
Knowledge of APIs, system integrations, and micro services.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent (preferred).
5+ years in full-stack development & system operations.
Strong problem-solving, debugging, and performance tuning skills.
Familiarity with telecom, Fintech, or e-top-up systems is a plus.
Soft Skills
Proactive and self-driven with a sense of ownership.
Good communication and documentation ability.
Ability to work in a lean startup-style environment.
Team player with mentoring potential.
KPIs
System uptime and performance (99%+ availability).
Timely deployment of updates and bug fixes.
Reduced reliance on external contractors.
Smooth handover and continuity post-launch.
Security and compliance incidents minimized.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are encouraged to submit their CVs along with a cover letter to hr@zood-pay.com by April 30, 2026. Please include the vacancy number, position title (VA-ZP-26-04-Full-Stack Developer / DevOps Engineer) in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application will not be considered.

details.Experience: 5+ years in full-stack development & system operations.
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent (preferred).

expiring_today.title: Graphic Designer – Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks
expiring_today.description:
About Researches Organization for Development (ROD)
The Research Organization for Development (ROD) is a registered Afghan non-governmental organization specializing in remote sensing, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), climate analysis, hydrology, and agricultural development. ROD operates through partnerships with leading international organizations including Welthungerhilfe (WHH), Catholic Relief Services (CRS), the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO), the World Meteorological Organization (WMO), and the World Bank, drawing on a global network of more than one hundred researchers.
Under its ongoing partnership with Welthungerhilfe (WHH), ROD is implementing the Farmer Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks project across five provinces in Afghanistan's Northern Agro-Ecological Region. The project aims to translate complex climate, hydrological, and agronomic analysis into clear, visual, and practical guidance that supports smallholder farmers many of whom have limited literacy in making informed cropping decisions under changing climate conditions.
Each of the five target provinces will receive a dedicated, province-specific handbook reflecting local climate conditions, water resources, crop calendars, and twelve recommended crops. To ensure these handbooks are accessible, culturally appropriate, and visually compelling, ROD is seeking a qualified Graphic Designer to lead the visual development and production of all handbook materials and related communication products.

Job Description
The Graphic Designer will be responsible for transforming ROD's technical content into visually engaging, farmer-friendly publications that communicate climate-smart agricultural guidance effectively to low-literacy audiences in Dari and Pashto. The designer will work closely with ROD's technical team (GIS specialists, agronomists, hydrologists, and climate analysts) to develop a unified visual identity, a master template, and final print-ready handbooks and supporting materials.
3. Scope of Work
Under the direct supervision of the Project Lead / Principal Investigator, the Graphic Designer will undertake the following tasks:
3.1 Design Strategy and Visual Identity
Develop a coherent visual identity and style guide for the Agro-Climate Crop Handbook series, aligned with ROD's brand (teal #217178 and orange #F78F1E) and WHH's visual standards.
Propose and agree with the project team on a design approach suitable for low-literacy rural audiences, emphasizing clarity, iconography, and illustration over dense text.
Design a master layout template (Dari/Pashto RTL-compliant) that can be adapted across the five province-specific handbooks.
3.2 Handbook Layout and Production
Design and lay out five (5) province-specific Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks (one per province), each covering twelve recommended crops, climate profiles, water resources, crop calendars, risk advisories, and good agricultural practices.
Integrate GIS-derived maps, remote sensing outputs, and charts provided by the technical team into the handbook layouts, ensuring cartographic clarity and consistent styling.
Develop custom infographics and data visualizations for climate trends, crop calendars, water availability, and climate risk indicators.
Create a custom icon set and illustration library (hand-drawn or vector illustration style) tailored to Afghan rural contexts and culturally appropriate.
Ensure all typography, layout direction, and text flow fully comply with Dari and Pashto right-to-left (RTL) conventions and use appropriate Persian/Pashto fonts.
3.3 Supporting Communication Materials
Design farmer-facing posters summarizing key messages from each provincial handbook for display at community and extension level.
Design extension flyers and leaflets to complement the handbooks for field distribution by WHH and partners.
Design WHH-facing report covers, title pages, and layout templates for associated project reports and deliverables.
3.4 Review, Validation, and Finalization
Incorporate feedback from ROD's internal technical review, WHH review, and farmer validation focus group discussions conducted in the field.
Prepare final print-ready files (high-resolution PDF/X, CMYK color profile), packaged InDesign source files with all linked assets, editable vector files, and embedded/outlined fonts.
Provide digital versions (web-optimized PDFs) suitable for online publication and sharing.
3.5 Coordination and Documentation
Participate in regular coordination meetings with the Project Lead and technical team.
Maintain clear version control of all design files and submit editable source files at the end of the assignment.
Document the design style guide and template specifications to enable future updates by ROD.

Job Requirements
4. 1 Education
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field. A Master's degree or specialized certification is an asset.
4.2 Professional Experience
Minimum two (2) years of demonstrated professional experience for male candidate and one (1) year for female candidate in graphic design and editorial/publication layout, preferably for NGOs, international organizations, or development projects.
Proven track record designing publications for low-literacy or rural audiences, with a strong portfolio of farmer-facing, community-oriented, or extension materials.
Prior experience designing multilingual publications in Dari and/or Pashto (RTL layout) is essential.
Experience integrating maps, infographics, and data visualizations into printed materials is highly desirable.
4.3 Technical Skills (Essential)
Expert proficiency in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator (essential).
Strong skills in Adobe Photoshop and related graphic production tools.
Demonstrated ability to design infographics and data visualizations (climate data, crop calendars, risk charts).
Demonstrated experience with Dari/Pashto RTL typography, including appropriate Persian/Pashto font selection and layout conventions.
Strong illustration skills, preferably with a hand-drawn or custom vector style suitable for low-literacy audiences.
Sound understanding of print production workflows, color management (CMYK), and preparing press-ready files.
4.4 Desirable Skills
Familiarity with cartographic design principles and integrating GIS outputs into publications.
Experience designing for humanitarian or agricultural development projects in Afghanistan or similar contexts.
Basic knowledge of accessibility and inclusive design principles.
4.5 Language
Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto is required.
Working knowledge of English is required for communication with the technical team and reviewing source content.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are invited to submit the following documents:
A cover letter (maximum one page) outlining motivation and suitability for the position.
An updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) with at least two professional references.
A portfolio of previous relevant design work (PDF or web link), with particular emphasis on publications, infographics, and Dari/Pashto layouts.
Applications should be submitted by email to: hr@rod.af
Subject line: "Graphic Designer – Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks – [Applicant Name]"
Closing date: Open until filled. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and interviews will be conducted as suitable candidates apply. The position will be closed once a desired candidate is identified and contracted.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a short design test as part of the selection process. ROD reserves the right to cancel, postpone, or modify this announcement at any stage.

Submission Email
hr@rod.af

details.Experience: Minimum two (2) years of demonstrated professional experience for male candidate and one (1) year for female candidate in graphic design and editorial/publication layout, preferably for NGOs, international organizations, or development projects.
details.Education: Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field. A Master's degree or specialized certification is an asset.
details.Years of Experience: Minimum two (2) years of demonstrated professional experience for male candidate and one (1) year for female candidate in graphic design and editorial/publication layout, preferably for NGOs, international organizations, or development projects.

expiring_today.title: IT /Web Development Officer
expiring_today.description: About OPHCD Organization Background Organization for Promotion of Health & Community Development (OPHCD) is a nongovernmental, non-political and independent organization. OPHCD has been established in 2017 and registered with the NGOs Department of the Ministry of Economy of the with license # 4160 as well as registered with the Ministry of Public Health of the Government of Islamic Republic of Afghanistan with the registration #1316. In addition, the organization has membership of Afghanistan National Health cluster, Afghanistan National Nutrition Cluster and ACBAR. OPHCD, as a non-governmental organization striving for well-being of the people through promotion of health, education, WASH, protection and human right, economic stability and sustainable development of the communities with focus on the women and children, drugs users, IDPs and other marginalized group of the society with an equitable manner. Job Description Main duties and responsibilities: OPHCD will establish a state-of-the-art IT setup and develop a comprehensive Fixed Asset Register and Inventory System. The incumbent for this assignment will be hired to carry out the tasks stated below and will deliver the outputs specified in the Deliverables section of this TOR. IT Responsibilities: Survey and design a Network system for OPHCD Main Office. Set up workstations with computers and necessary peripheral devices (routers, printers etc.) Assess the available IT infrastructure of the OPHCD and recommend upgradation and provide the required specification and estimations. Ensure security and privacy of networks and computer systems Assist OPHCD in adopting to new version of software for Project Planning and Management, Designing and Virtual Meetings. Web Development Responsibilities Assess the current OPHCD Website and recommend technical and designing modification, so that the looks, design and technical back-hand of the Website will become full enhanced and improved. Ensure that the website and webmail addresses are fully secure and required security measures are taken. Open the YouTube Channel for OPHCD and linked the videos to the Website Ensure that a strategy is developed to ensure that content is always updated on timely manner and the Website appears in the Searches of major Search Engines. Develop the online database platform for OPHCD HR, Finance, Data Master Sheet, Logistic Databases and Technical Report Databases. Assist OPHCD in establishing an online Share Drive for backing up its important files. Train Staff of the organization in content updating and the strategy to keep the website in the search engine lists. Develop a system for Backing up files from Web sites to local directories for recovery. Job Requirements Qualification: At least Bachelor degree in Computer Science with 3 years’ experience in IT and database development field. Having international recognized certification in the field would be an advantage. Skills: Network basics (LAN, WAN, troubleshooting) Server management (Linux/Windows servers) Hardware & software troubleshooting System installation and configuration Backup and recovery systems knowledge of web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP) Submission Guideline 1.Interested candidates apply through the below link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1O_lrFbEeURZGXxDhtf_gPAivMNJm7h3U64TN_JBWE4Y/edit#responses 2. Fill the Form Online and Submit your Cv Through the Below Email Address: jobs.ophcd@gmail.com and Mention the Title and Vacancy Number in Subject Line 3.OPHCD has zero tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA). 4.By applying to this position, you agree to all OPHCD policies regarding Data Protection and Sharing and also PSEAH Submission Email jobs.ophcd@gmail.com

expiring_today.description: Role Summary We are seeking a skilled Mobile Application Developer responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high quality mobile applications for both Android and iOS platforms. The role involves collaborating with product managers, designers, and backend developers to deliver scalable, secure, and user-friendly mobile solutions. Duties and Responsibilities ⁠Design, develop, test, and maintain mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms. ⁠Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement responsive and intuitive user interfaces. ⁠Integrate mobile applications with RESTful APIs and backend services. ⁠Ensure application performance, quality, and responsiveness. ⁠Identify and fix bugs, performance bottlenecks, and security vulnerabilities. ⁠Maintain proper documentation of application architecture and development processes. ⁠Publish and manage applications on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store. Job Requirements ⁠Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. ⁠Proven experience in mobile application development. ⁠Strong experience with at least one cross-platform framework such as: Flutter React Native ⁠Knowledge of Git version control and collaborative development workflows. ⁠Understanding of mobile application security and performance optimization. Preferred Skills Experience with state management frameworks (Redux, Provider, Bloc, etc.). ⁠Familiarity with cloud services such as AWS, Firebase, or Google Cloud. ⁠Experience integrating push notifications, maps, payment gateways, and third-party SDKs. ⁠Knowledge of Agile or Scrum development methodologies. ⁠Experience with automated testing for mobile applications. Submission Guidelines Eligible applicants are requested to submit their CV to the following email address: hr@mbt.af

expiring_today.title: Procurement officer
expiring_today.salary: As per company Salary Scale Policy
expiring_today.description: About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations. Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues. Job Description A Procurement Officer is responsible for sourcing, negotiating, and managing contracts for telecom equipment, IT hardware/software, and services essential to network operations. The role requires strong vendor management, cost optimization, and compliance with industry standards. The Procurement Officer ensures timely and cost-effective acquisition of goods and services critical to ISP operations, including networking equipment, fiber optic cables, routers, servers, software licenses, and facility services. They act as the link between technical teams and suppliers to maintain uninterrupted service delivery. Key Responsibilities Supplier Management Identify, evaluate, and onboard reliable vendors for telecom and IT products. Negotiate contracts, pricing, and service-level agreements (SLAs). Maintain long-term supplier relationships to ensure continuity of supply. Procurement Operations Manage purchase requisitions and approvals in line with company policy. Ensure timely delivery of equipment and services to support network expansion and maintenance. Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with warehouse/logistics teams. Cost & Compliance Optimize procurement costs while maintaining quality standards. Ensure compliance with local regulations, ISP licensing requirements, and company procurement policies. Prepare procurement reports for management and auditors. Cross-Functional Collaboration Work closely with engineering, IT, and finance departments to align procurement with technical needs and budget. Support project teams in sourcing specialized equipment for new installations or upgrades. Job Requirements Education : Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Engineering, or related field. Experience : 3–5 years in procurement, preferably in telecom/ISP or IT industries. Skills : Strong negotiation and contract management skills. Knowledge of telecom/ISP equipment and vendor landscape. Analytical and financial acumen for cost control. Proficiency in ERP/procurement software. Excellent communication in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto for Kabul context). Personal Attributes : Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive. Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects. Ethical and transparent in procurement practices. Submission Guideline Those who fulfill the above-mentioned criteria should send their updated CV & Cover letter to the email below: While applying, kindly mention the Vacancy number “HKB/Kabul/Procurement/2026” in the subject line of E-mail. Without doing so, your application will not be considered complete. Submission Email hr@hindukush-bridge.com

expiring_today.title: RAN Drive Test Engineer
expiring_today.description: Role Summary The DT Engineer is responsible for performing network drive test (DT) activities on the Radio Access Network (RAN) across multi-vendor and multi-technology 2G, 3G, and LTE sites. Duties and Responsibilities Network DT activities performed on the RAN covering multi-vendor/multi-technology 2G, 3G & LTE sites. Detailed knowledge of all OEM parameter and feature sets as well as recommended settings, OEM KPI’s and counters, counters specific to measure subscriber experience, Handling Post Processing procedures/ guidelines. Identification of KPIs relating to coverage, accessibility, mobility, integrity, and service retainability for optimization for all Radio bearers/ services including Voice and Data. Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues, poor network services, loss of signal strength and data service faults on the network. Customer Complaint management which includes both proactive and reactive quality improvement initiatives. Coordinating with Optimization teams, scheduling daily, weekly, monthly, Ad-hoc activities to perform detailed DTs. RF Coverage analysis, parameter optimizations, antenna tilt verifications and suggestions. Periodic network motorway drive test campaigns in major metros, Ad-hoc drive testing for quality benchmarking and RAN Optimisation activities including Single Site Verification Test report for newly integrated sites of technologies. Maintaining a parameter & customer complaint database which details all the RAN parameters under control of the Optimisation Dept. Analyzed logs of Radio tools for identifying issues in the coverage and quality area. Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues and faults in the network. Collaborate with business support service teams to identify new potential sales areas. Must have Hands-on Routine network activities. Radio Network Topology Audit, Radio Network Parameter consistency checks Major route drive testing, Malls, IBS/DAS, walk/drive testing. Sign-off the performance acceptance as per agreed Quality Targets for all modernization projects. Strong Hands-on and Knowledge of DT & Post Processing Tools (e.g., TEMS, Nemo, MapInfo, Actix, GE Tools). OH&S/QMS Role and Responsibilities: Reports any hazards or risks in addition to Accidents/Incident to QHSE department. Be aware of and complies to i engineering’s IMS Policy. Abides by i engineering’s Local Legal and Client Requirements. Attends and engages in IMS Awareness Sessions. Ensures that all IMS procedures are regularly followed and raises the issue when they are not Job Requirements Minimum 2-3 years of experience. Must have strong telecom skills and knowledge of common programs such as Microsoft Office. Ability to work under pressure. Capable of professionally managing confidential information. Submission Guidelines Make sure to write the position title and vacancy number in the subject line of your email and send your CV along with a cover letter. Only short listed candidates will be notified.

expiring_today.description: About معاونیت تامینات تکنالوژی ولوژستیک وزارت دفاع ملی د ټکنالوژی او لوژستیکی تامنیاتو معینیت د ملي دفاع وزارت په چوکاټ کی یوه معینیت ده چې د اسلامي ملي اردو د ټکنالوژۍ او لوژستیکي تامیناتو په برخه کې فعالیت کوي Job Description د دندې هدف : د ملي امنیت او اقتصادي پرمختګ د ستراتیژیکو موخو سره سم، د ملی دفاع وزارت اړوند پانګونې پروژې په اغېزمنه توګه پېژندل، طرح کول، ارزول او مدیریت کول، څو د دفاعي سکتور د مالي سرچینو اغېز زیات شي، اقتصادي خطرونه کم شي، او د ملي زیربناوو او دفاعي وړتیاوو د پیاوړتیا لپاره د پانګوالو، امارتی او غیر امارتی ادارو ترمنځ همکاري رامنځته شي د دندې تشریح د ملي امنیت او اقتصادي پرمختګ د موخو سره سم د ملیدفاع وزارت اړوند پانګونې پروژې پېژندل، طرح کول او لومړیتوب ورکول د وړاندیز شویو پروژو د امکان‌سنجۍ او لګښت-ګټې تحلیل ترسره کول د ملی دفاع وزارت مشرتابه ته د اقتصادي خطرونو او عایداتو په اړه مشوره ورکول د دفاعي بودیجې د اغېزمنې وېش لپاره ماډلونه جوړول، د ضایعاتو مخنیوی او د اغېز زیاتول د وړاندیز شویو پانګونو اقتصادي خطرونه، جیوپولټیکي عوامل او امنیتي اغېزې ارزول د ملی دفاع وزارت، پانګوالو، امارتی او غیر امارتی ادارو ترمنځ د همکارۍ د رامنځته کولو لپاره د خبرو اترو اسانتیا د فعالیت شاخصونه ټاکل، پرمختګ څارل او د پانګونې پروژو اقتصادي او ستراتیژیک پایلې ارزول د ملی دفاع وزارت کارکوونکو ته د اقتصادي تحلیل، پانګونې ارزونې او د پروژې مدیریت روزنه ورکول په زیربنایی پروژو کی د پانګوالو هڅولو لپاره پالیسۍ طرح کول او سپارښتنه کول د ټولو پانګونې پروژو د ملي قوانینو، د فساد ضد تدابیرو سره د مطابقت ډاډمنول د نورو دندو ترسره کول چې قانون سره سم د مافوق په امر اجرا کېږي Job Requirements لنډ مهاله کورسونه او د خدمت دننه روزنې په کمپیوټري پروګرامونو تسلط په رسمي ژبو (دري او پښتو بشپړ تسلط او په انګلیسی ژبه بلدتیا Submission Guideline په شرایطو وړ کسان دې خپل د سوانحو خلص (CV) او غوښتنلیکونه د د لاندې برېښنالیک پته ته واستوي، او د ایمیل په عنوان کې دې د وظیفې کود نمبر او عنوان ذکر کړي Submission Email DMTECLOGSUP@GMAIL.COM

expiring_today.description: About معاونیت تامینات تکنالوژی ولوژستیک وزارت دفاع ملی د ټکنالوژی او لوژستیکی تامنیاتو معینیت د ملي دفاع وزارت په چوکاټ کی یوه معینیت ده چې د اسلامي ملي اردو د ټکنالوژۍ او لوژستیکي تامیناتو په برخه کې فعالیت کوي Job Description د دندې هدف: د انکشافي او پانګونې پروژو طرحه او ډیزاین کول د ساحې د تفصیلي پلانونو او توپوګرافۍ پر بنسټ، د سافټویرونو په کارولو سره، د ملي او نړیوالو نورمونو او معیارونو سره سمون کې د دندې تشریح د ملي دفاع وزارت د پنځه کلن عمومي انکشافي پلان سره سم د اړوند کاري بخش پلان ترتیبول د پروژو معلومات، احصایې او ارقام راټولول او اړین ساحوي مطالعات ترسره کول پر څو طرحو د انجنیري محاسباتو او تحلیلونو ترسره کول او د مناسب، اقتصادي او اغېزمنې طرحې انتخاب د ابتدایي او تفصیلي ډیزاینونو او نقشو ترتیبول، په شمول د قطعو او اوږدو پروفایلونو د کاري احجامو، تخنیکي مشخصاتو او ساختماني موادو ترتیبول د مکس ډیزاین ترتیبول د پروژې د کاري احجامو او قیمتونو سنجش او ترتیب د ډیزاینونو د سم تطبیق څارنه او د ساختماني موادو نمونو ارزونه او انجنیري آزموینې د ترسره شوو فعالیتونو راپور ورکول په اونیز، میاشتنی، ربع وار او کلني ډول اړوند بخش ته د نورو دندو ترسره کول چې قانون سره سم د مافوق په امر اجرا کېږي Job Requirements اړین مهارتونه د GIS او Google Earth په کارولو سره د دقیقو نقشو جوړول لنډ مهاله کورسونه او د خدمت دننه روزنې په کمپیوټري پروګرامونو بشپړ تسلط په رسمي ژبو (دري او پښتو) بشپړ تسلط او په انګلیسي ژبه بلدتیا Submission Guideline او غوښتنلیکونه د د لاندې برېښنالیک پته ته واستوي، او د ایمیل په عنوان کې دې د وظیفې کود نمبر او عنوان ذکر کړي (CV) په شرایطو وړ کسان دې خپل د سوانحو خلص Submission Email DMTECLOGSUP@GMAIL.COM

expiring_soon.title: Country IT & Business Solutions Officer
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary The IT & Business Solutions Officer (Officer) is responsible for overseeing and managing all aspects of IT operations in a country where Women for Women International operates. This role requires a strong technical background, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work independently while collaborating with cross-functional teams. The Officer will ensure the smooth functioning of all IT systems, infrastructure, and services in the country, aligning them with the overall Global IT strategy and organizational objectives. Additionally, the Officer will play a crucial role in improving business processes, increasing efficiencies, providing regular applications and information security training, successfully implementing initiatives directed from the Global IT team, leading both local and global projects, contributing to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans, and ensuring compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable laws in the country. Duties and Responsibilities Engagement Internal Relations Collaborate closely with the Admin Coordinator and Global IT team to align country-level IT operations with organizational strategies. Serve as the primary IT focal point for all departments within the Afghanistan Country Office, ensuring smooth communication and coordination. Work cross-functionally with Program, Finance, Administration, and Operations teams to identify business process improvements and technology-driven efficiencies. Provide IT advice and guidance to senior leadership and staff, fostering a culture of digital literacy and security awareness. External Relations Manage relationships with local IT vendors, service providers, and consultants, ensuring compliance with organizational standards and service-level agreements. Liaise with internet service providers, equipment suppliers, and external technical support as required. Delivery IT Infrastructure Management : Manage and maintain the IT infrastructure in the country, including network devices, storage systems, and telecommunications equipment. Ensure that the infrastructure is secure, scalable, and optimized for efficient operations. Systems Administration : Administer and support the country office's computer systems, including operating systems, software applications, and user accounts following the standards and procedures set by Global IT. Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement necessary upgrades or patches. Technical/Helpdesk Support : Provide technical support and assistance to end-users in the country, addressing hardware and software problems, network connectivity issues, and other IT-related queries. Resolve support requests in a timely manner to minimize downtime and disruptions and escalate requests to Global IT promptly when needed. Utilize Global IT's ticketing system to track and manage support requests, ensuring efficient communication and documentation. Network and Connectivity : Manage the local network infrastructure, including routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points. Ensure reliable connectivity within the office and to the Internet, implementing necessary security measures to protect data and systems. IT Security and Training : Implement and enforce IT security policies and procedures in accordance with the organization's standards. Regularly assess and monitor the country office's IT security posture, identifying vulnerabilities and recommending appropriate measures to mitigate risks. Conduct regular applications and information security training for all users, with a specific focus on data protection and maximizing the use of available systems. IT Procurement and Vendor Management: Collaborate with the Global IT team and local stakeholders to identify IT needs and procure necessary hardware, software, and services for the country. Manage vendor relationships and contracts, ensuring compliance with service level agreements. Business Process Improvement: Work closely with other teams in the country office to identify areas for process improvement and increased efficiency. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and provide IT solutions that streamline operations. Act as a consultant and advisor on IT-related matters, helping teams successfully implement new initiatives directed by the Global IT team. Lead both local and global projects and contribute to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans. Backup and Disaster Recovery: Ensure information across devices and systems is properly backed up. Develop and maintain a country’s disaster recovery plan to ensure business continuity in various crisis scenarios. Regularly test and validate these plans' effectiveness, making necessary improvements to ensure business continuity in case of disruptions or outages. Documentation and Reporting: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation of IT systems and assets, processes, and configurations in the country office. Prepare regular reports on IT operations, including performance metrics, incident trends, and project updates for monthly management review. Utilize Global IT's knowledge management system to document changes and create help materials for users. Compliance with GDPR and Applicable Laws : Ensure compliance with GDPR regulations and any other applicable data protection laws in the country. Implement measures to safeguard personal data and privacy rights. Conduct regular audits and assessments to verify compliance and provide reports to the appropriate stakeholders. Business Process Improvement: Work closely with other teams in the country office to identify areas for process improvement and increased efficiency. Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and provide IT solutions that streamline operations. Act as a consultant and advisor on IT-related matters, helping teams successfully implement new initiatives directed by the Global IT team. Lead both local and global projects and contribute to the advancement of Global IT's annual plans. Job Requirements Job Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field. Proven experience in IT operations, infrastructure management, and technical support (3+ years preferred). Strong knowledge of networking principles, systems administration, and IT security. Familiarity with relevant technologies, such as Windows/Mac, Android and iOS operating systems, virtualization, cloud services, and enterprise applications. Certifications in relevant areas (e.g., CCNA, Meraki, MCSA, ITIL) are a plus. Ability to work independently and collaboratively as part of a team. Fluent written and verbal Dari, Pashto language skills; please expect written fluency testing. Fluent written and verbal English language skills Willing and able to travel to sub-offices as needed as well as travel internationally. Demonstrated ability to take decisions proactively , work autonomously, and solicit team and leadership support when appropriate. Attention to details, Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, strong use of logic and creativity . Impeccable integrity. Demonstrated ability to navigate Afghanistan’s laws and regulations, and to effectively, respectfully , responsibly, and ethically manage contextual and extraordinary complexities. Meticulous organizational and time-management skills; able to prioritize and manage order of operations within multiple projects, directing and maximizing team inputs while: proactively supporting team wellbeing. Committed to progress in the workplace, including progress in equity for all , diversity, inclusion, and belonging. Working Conditions: This position typically operates in an office environment. Occasional overtime may be required to meet deadlines or complete projects. Submission Guidelines Please clearly mention the Job Title and Vacancy Number in the subject line of your email. We appreciate your interest in joining our team.

details.Contract Duration: Full-time, Regular with possibility of extension
details.Years of Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of progressive experience in operations management within NGO, INGO, UN, or similar environments, including substantial experience in Afghanistan.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Chief Information Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
